temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue robe, is buried up to her chest in deep snow. She is trapped in a small, dark, wooden structure, possibly a shed or a snow fort. Her face is contorted in terror as she screams and frantically digs at the snow with her bare hands, trying to create an escape route. (Storyline: The scene opens with immediate tension, establishing the protagonist's perilous situation. She is trapped and in distress, setting a suspenseful and frightening tone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, terrified. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of frantic shuffling in the snow and a low, ominous musical score begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a wide, establishing shot of a vast, snow-covered mountain at night. A single, tiny figure of a person stands on a small hill in the distance, illuminated by a single streetlight. The building from the previous scene is a small, dark structure on the side of the mountain. (Storyline: This shot provides context for the woman's situation, emphasizing her complete isolation and the vast, indifferent nature of her surroundings. It confirms she is trapped on a remote mountain.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate, panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, low-frequency score continues, enhancing the sense of dread.)
